message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classDiagram
    class SuperAlertBgView {
        <<interface>>
        String placeholder
        function ComfirmHandler(String)
        object bgView
        function show()
        function hide()
    }

    class KeyboardFieldView {
        <<interface>>
    }

    SuperAlertBgView <|-- KeyboardFieldView
    SuperAlertBgView ..> KeyboardFieldView

    note right of SuperAlertBgView
        封装半透明遮罩层,和展示隐藏逻辑实现
    end note

    note right of KeyboardFieldView
        设计到两个知识点
        1. 半遮罩层
        2. 键盘监听事件
        3. 自动布局实现动态控制TextView的高度
    end note

    note right of SuperAlertBgView
        在键盘上添加输入框的实现方式
        创建时间: <2019-09-11 21:17>
    end note

    note right of KeyboardFieldView
        继承<
    end note

@enduml
